ValidationRule.description: Start Date is mandatory at "In Service" stage.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Client_delivery_request", OR( ISPICKVAL(Type,"Client Delivery"), ISPICKVAL(Type,"Solvency") ), ISPICKVAL(Status, "In Service"), TEXT(Start_Date__c) ="" ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Start Date is missing on this request. Please add one before changing to "In Service" Status
